summary: TVac Qualification evidence package for a generic reference DUT.

requirements.title: Required cycle count completed
requirements.description: Requirement used to demonstrate measurement-to-evidence traceability.
requirements.rationale: Observed 8 backend-defined thermal cycles for TVac Qualification - 8 cycle vacuum thermal profile.

requirements.title: Hot target reached
requirements.description: Requirement used to demonstrate measurement-to-evidence traceability.
requirements.rationale: Chamber command, chamber air, article-zone traces, and acceptance bands show hot target achievement near 70.0 degC.

requirements.title: Cold target reached
requirements.description: Requirement used to demonstrate measurement-to-evidence traceability.
requirements.rationale: Cold ramp, LN2 duty, chamber air, and article-zone traces show cold target achievement near -40.0 degC.

requirements.title: Hot survival exposure completed
requirements.description: Requirement used to demonstrate measurement-to-evidence traceability.
requirements.rationale: The first cycle includes hot survival exposure before the hot operational functional gate.

requirements.title: Cold survival exposure completed
requirements.description: Requirement used to demonstrate measurement-to-evidence traceability.
requirements.rationale: The first cycle includes cold survival exposure before the cold operational functional gate.

requirements.title: Stabilization window achieved
requirements.description: Requirement used to demonstrate measurement-to-evidence traceability.
requirements.rationale: Dwell-window evidence uses source freshness, article-zone convergence, and stability markers from the physics-backed thermal model.

requirements.title: Dwell duration achieved
requirements.description: Requirement used to demonstrate measurement-to-evidence traceability.
requirements.rationale: Hot and cold dwell windows are declared for all 8 cycles and referenced by telemetry evidence.

requirements.title: Pre-environment functional gate passed
requirements.description: Requirement used to demonstrate measurement-to-evidence traceability.
requirements.rationale: Functional gate markers are present in telemetry and linked to load, TM/TC bus latency, packet counter, and thermal self-heating evidence.

requirements.title: Functional test after survival exposure passed
requirements.description: Requirement used to demonstrate measurement-to-evidence traceability.
requirements.rationale: Functional gate markers are present in telemetry and linked to load, TM/TC bus latency, packet counter, and thermal self-heating evidence.

requirements.title: During-environment functional gate passed
requirements.description: Requirement used to demonstrate measurement-to-evidence traceability.
requirements.rationale: Functional gate markers are present in telemetry and linked to load, TM/TC bus latency, packet counter, and thermal self-heating evidence.

requirements.title: Post-environment functional gate passed
requirements.description: Requirement used to demonstrate measurement-to-evidence traceability.
requirements.rationale: Functional gate markers are present in telemetry and linked to load, TM/TC bus latency, packet counter, and thermal self-heating evidence.

requirements.title: Evidence data quality acceptable
requirements.description: Requirement used to demonstrate measurement-to-evidence traceability.
requirements.rationale: Sensor freshness, dropout/source-quality flags, and graph evidence markers are evaluated from the generated physical telemetry.

requirements.title: Anomaly review disposition complete
requirements.description: Requirement used to demonstrate measurement-to-evidence traceability.
requirements.rationale: Interlock and anomaly disposition references are tied to exact cycle/phase timestamps in the thermal program.
